---
title: "Cointegration and Pairs Trading: AAPL, MSFT, and GOOG (2011–2025)"
author: " Tobenna Nwogu-Agbakuru "
date: "2025-07-16"
format: pdf
editor: visual
echo: false
warning: false

---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(quantmod)
library(tidyverse)
library(urca)
library(tseries)
library(vars)
library(zoo)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(TTR)
library(FinTS)
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
```

```{r}
# Define tickers and date range
tickers <- c("AAPL", "MSFT", "GOOG")
start_date <- as.Date("2011-07-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2025-06-30")

# Download adjusted closing prices
getSymbols(tickers, src = "yahoo", from = start_date, to = end_date)
prices <- merge(Ad(get(tickers[1])), Ad(get(tickers[2])), Ad(get(tickers[3])))
colnames(prices) <- tickers

```

```{r}
prices_df <- data.frame(Date = index(prices), coredata(prices))

# Melt to long format
prices_long <- melt(prices_df, id.vars = "Date",
                    variable.name = "Stock", value.name = "Price")

# Plot with legend
ggplot(prices_long, aes(x = Date, y = Price, color = Stock)) +
  geom_line(size = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Daily Adjusted Closing Prices (AAPL, MSFT, GOOG)",
       x = "Date", y = "Price (USD)",
       color = "Stock") +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
# ADF tests
adf_results <- lapply(as.data.frame(prices), function(x) adf.test(x, k=1))
adf_results

# KPSS tests
kpss_results <- lapply(as.data.frame(prices), function(x) kpss.test(x, null="Level"))
kpss_results

```

```{r}
# johansen_test
# Select optimal VAR lag 
log_prices <- log(prices)
lag_sel <- VARselect(log_prices, lag.max = 10, type = "const")$selection
lag_sel

K_opt <- as.integer(lag_sel["AIC(n)"])   # use AIC; change if you prefer HQ or SC
K_opt

johansen_test <- ca.jo(log_prices, type = "trace", ecdet = "const", K = K_opt)
summary(johansen_test)

```

```{r}
# Vector Error Correction Model (ECM)

# r=1 from Johansen trace test
vecm_model <- cajorls(johansen_test, r = 1)  
summary(vecm_model$rlm)

```

```{r}
# Robust inference for the VECM (Newey–West)
coeftest(vecm_model$rlm, vcov = NeweyWest(vecm_model$rlm, lag = 20, prewhite = FALSE))

```

```{r}
#  VECM residual diagnostics
# Ljung-Box test for autocorrelation (lag 20 as example)
# ARCH-LM test for conditional heteroskedasticity
residuals_vecm <- resid(vecm_model$rlm)

for (col in colnames(residuals_vecm)) {
  cat("\nResidual diagnostics for", col, "\n")
  print(Box.test(residuals_vecm[, col], type = "Ljung", lag = 20))
  print(ArchTest(residuals_vecm[, col], lags = 12))
}

```

```{r}
#Spread Construction & Trading Simulation (AAPL base)

# Cointegration vector (AAPL as base) 
beta <- johansen_test@V[, 1]              
b_raw <- beta[1:3]                       
b <- b_raw / b_raw[1]                     
b_const <- beta[4] / b_raw[1]             

# Spread (level) for signal generation 
spread <- drop(log_prices %*% b) + as.numeric(b_const)
spread <- xts(spread, order.by = index(log_prices))

# Plot spread with mean and ±1σ bands
sp_mean <- mean(spread, na.rm = TRUE)
sp_sd   <- sd(spread, na.rm = TRUE)
plot(spread, main = "Cointegration Spread (AAPL base)", col = "blue", ylab = "Spread")
abline(h = sp_mean, col = "red", lty = 2)
abline(h = sp_mean + sp_sd, col = "darkgray", lty = 3)
abline(h = sp_mean - sp_sd, col = "darkgray", lty = 3)

# Trading signals (mean reversion on spread)
sig <- ifelse(spread > sp_mean + sp_sd, -1,
              ifelse(spread < sp_mean - sp_sd,  1, 0))
sig <- xts(sig, order.by = index(spread))

# Portfolio returns using hedge ratios from beta (exclude constant) 
# Use log returns; portfolio return each day is b' * Δlog_prices (AAPL=1, MSFT=b2, GOOG=b3)
rets <- diff(log_prices)
port_ret <- drop(rets %*% b)                       
port_ret <- xts(port_ret, order.by = index(rets))

# Strategy returns: use previous-day signal (to avoid lookahead)
sig_lag <- Lag(sig, k = 1)
strat_ret <- sig_lag * port_ret
strat_ret[is.na(strat_ret)] <- 0

# Cumulative returns 
cum_ret <- cumsum(strat_ret)

# Plot cumulative returns
plot(cum_ret, type = "l", col = "darkgreen", lwd = 1.5,
     main = "Pairs Trading Strategy: Cumulative Log Return",
     ylab = "Cumulative Log Return", xlab = "Date")
abline(h = 0, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 1.2)
legend("topleft", legend = c("Cumulative Return", "Zero Line"),
       col = c("darkgreen", "red"), lty = c(1, 2),
       lwd = c(1.5, 1.2), bty = "n", cex = 0.85)

```

```{r}
# Additional performance metrics

# Max drawdown (%), using equity from log returns
equity <- exp(cum_ret)
dd <- 1 - (equity / cummax(equity))
max_dd_pct <- max(dd, na.rm = TRUE)

# Hit ratio (daily)
hit_ratio_daily <- mean(strat_ret > 0, na.rm = TRUE)

# Trade-level hit ratio & average holding period
sig_lag_vec <- as.vector(sig_lag)
active <- sig_lag_vec != 0
active[is.na(active)] <- FALSE
runs <- rle(active)

# average holding period (days)
hold_lengths <- runs$lengths[runs$values]
avg_hold_days <- if (length(hold_lengths)) mean(hold_lengths) else NA_real_

# trade PnL
trade_pnls <- c()
idx <- 0L
for (k in seq_along(runs$lengths)) {
  len <- runs$lengths[k]; idx_end <- idx + len
  if (isTRUE(runs$values[k])) {
    seg <- strat_ret[(idx + 1L):idx_end]
    trade_pnls <- c(trade_pnls, sum(seg, na.rm = TRUE))
  }
  idx <- idx_end
}
hit_ratio_trades <- if (length(trade_pnls)) mean(trade_pnls > 0) else NA_real_

# Basic performance summary 
n_trades <- sum(diff(sig != 0) == 1, na.rm = TRUE)   # count entries
avg_ret  <- mean(strat_ret, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_ret   <- sd(strat_ret, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe   <- ifelse(sd_ret == 0, NA, avg_ret / sd_ret * sqrt(252))

cat("Number of trades:", n_trades, "\n")
cat("Average daily return:", round(avg_ret, 6), "\n")
cat("Daily return SD:", round(sd_ret, 6), "\n")
cat("Approx. daily Sharpe (252):", round(sharpe, 3), "\n")
cat("Max drawdown (%):", round(100 * max_dd_pct, 2), "\n")
cat("Hit ratio (daily):", round(100 * hit_ratio_daily, 1), "%\n")
cat("Hit ratio (trades):", ifelse(is.na(hit_ratio_trades), "NA",
                                  paste0(round(100 * hit_ratio_trades, 1), "%")), "\n")
cat("Average holding period (days):", round(avg_hold_days, 2), "\n")

```

```{r}
#Cost-adjusted backtest (per-side costs on every position change) 
cost_per_side <- 0.0005  # 0.05% per side

# Align lagged position vector to strategy return index
sig_lag_aligned <- sig_lag[index(strat_ret)]

# Position changes (0->1 or 1->0 => 1 side; 1->-1 or -1->1 => 2 sides)
pos_change <- diff(sig_lag_aligned)
pos_change[is.na(pos_change)] <- 0

# Build daily cost series aligned to strat_ret
costs_raw <- cost_per_side * abs(pos_change)                        # per-day transaction cost
cost_per_day <- merge(strat_ret, costs_raw, join = "left")[, 2]     # align to strat_ret index
cost_per_day[is.na(cost_per_day)] <- 0

# Cost-adjusted returns & cumulative return
strat_ret_cost_adj <- strat_ret - cost_per_day
cum_ret_cost <- cumsum(strat_ret_cost_adj)

# Recompute metrics with costs
avg_ret_cost <- mean(strat_ret_cost_adj, na.rm = TRUE)
sd_ret_cost  <- sd(strat_ret_cost_adj, na.rm = TRUE)
sharpe_cost  <- ifelse(sd_ret_cost == 0, NA, avg_ret_cost / sd_ret_cost * sqrt(252))

# (Optional) cost-adjusted equity plot
plot(cum_ret_cost, type = "l", lwd = 1.5,
     main = "Pairs Trading Strategy: Cumulative Log Return (Cost-Adjusted)",
     ylab = "Cumulative Log Return", xlab = "Date")
abline(h = 0, lty = 2)

# Trade counting that matches costs:
n_pos_changes <- sum(abs(coredata(pos_change)) > 0, na.rm = TRUE)

# Summaries
total_cost <- sum(cost_per_day, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("\n--- Cost-Adjusted Performance ---\n")
cat("Total transaction cost (sum of daily costs):", round(total_cost, 4), "\n")
cat("Position change events (entries/exits/flips):", n_pos_changes, "\n")
cat("Cost-adjusted average daily return:", round(avg_ret_cost, 6), "\n")
cat("Cost-adjusted Sharpe (252):", round(sharpe_cost, 3), "\n")

```
